title: viguiera deltoidea var. genuina
intro: Viguiera deltoidea var. genuina, also known as Sweetroot or Tarrumilla, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Viguiera deltoidea var. genuina include its ability to support wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Viguiera deltoidea var. genuina include teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used topically or orally to harness its medicinal properties.
